Balance of Venus Dasa at birth : Years 9-2-21.
Chart No. 114.—Born on 9-9-1911 ot 11-18 p.m.
(I.S.T.) (Lat. 22° 53' N., Long. 88° 27' E.)
Balance of Saturn Dasa at birth : Years 12-5-27.

274 How to Judge a Horoscope
a serious attack of smallpox. Mark the association of the
Sun with the 6th lord and the other afflictions he has been
subject to.
The lord of the 6th Mars, who is also the Rogakaraka,
is in the 12th aspecting the 6th (Chart No. 114). From the
Moon the 6th and the 6th lord are aspected by Mars. Lord
of Lagna Mercury and lord of vitality the Sun are both
aspected by Mars. Throughout Saturn Dasa (for the first 12
years) the native suffered from liver and spleen troubles.
Mark the fact that Saturn is lord of the 8th and is with Rahu,
of course, aspected by Jupiter. Venus, lord of the 8th from
the Moon is neecha and subject to Papakarthari Yoga.
Mercury the planet of nerves is considerably afflicted.
